title: [Griffin's Keen, Switchbacks]
description: Halfway up the mountainside, the trail dwindles away to nothing.  The last few feet are so slender as to prevent even a halfling's step.  Ten feet above, another level surface holds the promise of a continuation of the trail.

wayto.3990: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'east'
